title: Wan's Storage Shelves
description: Storage Shelves adds a shelf that combines functionality with aesthetics.
body:
## **📦 Organize with Elegance!**

Tired of messy chests? Bring order and style to your world with **Wan’s Storage Shelves**, a modular and beautiful storage solution, adding shelves that combine functionality with aesthetics.

***

## **🔍 Features**

*   🧱 **Small Cardboard Boxes**  
    Stack up to **3 boxes per shelf**:
    *   📦 1 box → 25 slots
    *   📦📦 2 boxes → 49 slots
    *   📦📦📦 3 boxes → 59 slots
*   📦 **Large Cardboard Box**  
    Sits alone in a shelf with **54 slots** - same as a double chest.
*   🪵 **Shelves in Every Wood Type**  
    Fully craftable using any **vanilla wood** - fits seamlessly into any build style!
*   🧰 **Fully Craftable**  
    All components are accessible in survival mode, no commands needed.

![item image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1271/759/boxes_showcase.png)

## **⭐ Highlights**

*   ✅ **Smart stacking** → Modular design that grows with your needs
*   ✅ **Chest-friendly** → Matches vanilla sizes for intuitive use
*   ✅ **Build-friendly** → Matches your wood of choice
*   ✅ **Survival-friendly** → Fully craftable without commands or cheats

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_94411464-6d67-41db-85a2-e6951a813d3a.png)

Shelf GUI with **all 3** cardboard boxes  **&**  Shelf GUI with large cardboard box

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_fbda761e-f117-4d09-9683-70e55e14e286.png)![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_bb07e5d9-a682-4fa9-a498-cfa6e2c404c3.png)

***
